allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Add-Type -TypeDefinition ''using System; using System.Runtime.InteropServices; public class W { [DllImport\(""user32.dll"", SetLastError=true, CharSet=CharSet.Auto\)] public static extern IntPtr FindWindow\(string c, string w\); [DllImport\(""user32.dll"", SetLastError=true, CharSet=CharSet.Auto\)] public static extern IntPtr FindWindowEx\(IntPtr p, IntPtr a, string c, string w\); }''; $t=[W]::FindWindow\(''Shell_TrayWnd'',$null\); Write-Host ''Shell_TrayWnd:'' $t; $n=[W]::FindWindowEx\($t,[IntPtr]::Zero,''TrayNotifyWnd'',$null\); Write-Host ''TrayNotifyWnd:'' $n; $s=[W]::FindWindowEx\($n,[IntPtr]::Zero,''SysPager'',$null\); Write-Host ''SysPager:'' $s; $tb=[W]::FindWindowEx\($s,[IntPtr]::Zero,''ToolbarWindow32'',$null\); Write-Host ''ToolbarWindow32:'' $tb; $ovf=[W]::FindWindow\(''NotifyIconOverflowWindow'',$null\); Write-Host ''OverflowWindow:'' $ovf; $ovftb=[W]::FindWindowEx\($ovf,[IntPtr]::Zero,''ToolbarWindow32'',$null\); Write-Host ''OverflowToolbar:'' $ovftb")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$shell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $roots = @\([Environment]::GetFolderPath\(""CommonStartMenu""\), [Environment]::GetFolderPath\(""StartMenu""\)\); foreach \($root in $roots\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter ""*.lnk"" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $lnk = $shell.CreateShortcut\($_.FullName\); if \([string]::IsNullOrEmpty\($lnk.TargetPath\)\) { Write-Host ""EMPTY TARGET: $\($_.Name\)"" } } }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$shell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $roots = @\([Environment]::GetFolderPath\(""CommonStartMenu""\), [Environment]::GetFolderPath\(""StartMenu""\)\); foreach \($root in $roots\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter ""*notepad*"" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.FullName } }')
